top_signals.title: Russia Eases Environmental Rules for Domestic Fuel amid Shortages
top_signals.summary: Russia’s government has authorized some refineries to produce gasoline and diesel with higher sulfur content and other lower environmental specifications in a bid to alleviate the ongoing fuel shortages, Russian daily Kommersant reported on Monday.      The government has extended the eased rules, which were introduced in the autumn of 2025, according to an unnamed source who spoke to Kommersant.    Russia’s authorities are also scrambling to alleviate domestic fuel shortages by banning exports of refined…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UBS sees gold price falling further, but remains long-term bullish
top_signals.summary: The Swiss bank said it sees prices to drop by another $300-$900/oz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Benchmark says SEC’s NMS proposal is the ‘most consequential’ US crypto rule this year
top_signals.summary: Benchmark said the SEC's proposal last week to rescind Rules 611 and 610(e) is the year's "most consequential" U.S. crypto rule.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SoftBank surges more than 10% as Iran-U.S. deal sends Asia tech stocks soaring - CNBC
top_signals.summary: SoftBank surges more than 10% as Iran-U.S. deal sends Asia tech stocks soaring  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
top_signals.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.
